summary: Iteration 323: All 5 critical fixes verified - Profile Security tab renders correctly, Admin satisfaction shows truth-based data (null when <5 ratings), Live Activity shows DIVERSE locations (8 unique countries). Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All critical flows verified with screenshots.
critical_code_review_comments: Profile.js: Missing useState declarations for showCurrentPassword, showNewPassword, showConfirmPassword were added - this was the root cause of blank Security tab
public_routes.py live-activity: Now filters out 'visionary-ai-system' user_id AND uses item_index in _anonymize_creator_async for diverse country rotation
admin_metrics.py satisfaction: Correctly requires minimum 5 ratings and returns satisfaction_pct=null with 'Not enough ratings yet' note when insufficient
Good pattern: Truth-based metrics that show 'No data' rather than fake scores
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 critical fixes are verified working: (1) Profile Security tab renders with Change Password form, (2) Admin satisfaction metric shows 'Not enough ratings yet' with null satisfaction_pct when <5 ratings, (3) No fake reviews - only real ratings counted, (4) Live Activity shows diverse locations (Turkey, South Korea, Mexico, Italy, Spain, Kenya, South Africa, Argentina), (5) All verified with API tests and UI screenshots.

Fix_1_Profile_Security_Tab.details: Security tab renders correctly with Change Password form, Current/New/Confirm password fields, password toggle button, and Update Password button

Fix_2_Admin_Satisfaction_Truth_Based.details: API returns rating_count=4, satisfaction_pct=null, satisfaction_note='Not enough ratings yet' - correctly shows 'No data' in UI

Fix_3_Authentic_Reviews.details: Satisfaction calculated from real feedback only with minimum 5 ratings requirement. No fake/seeded reviews counted

Fix_4_Diverse_Locations.details: Live Activity shows 8 unique countries: Turkey, South Korea, Mexico, Italy, Spain, Kenya, South Africa, Argentina - no repeated Seoul

Fix_5_All_Verified.details: Backend tests: 10/10 passed. Frontend: Screenshots captured showing Security tab and Live Activity with diverse locations
